theme: sorting hardware that tolerates one dead comparator
title: Dead-Comparator-Proof Sorting Network: Minimal Redundancy by Shared Mop-Up
strategies: duplicate every comparator (2S) -- the obvious fault-tolerance recipe / documented trap (greedy)
compact sort + a few shared odd-even mop-up rounds that repair every single-deletion fault at once (strong)
true minimum 1-fault-tolerant network (unknown; overhead below ~1.5x is open frontier)
